<!-- docs-builder:start -->
# lynkbyte/docs-builder

> A Laravel package that compiles Markdown files and OpenAPI 3.x YAML specifications into a fully themed, searchable, static documentation site ‚Äî with zero frontend build step required.

## Overview

Docs Builder is a Laravel package (PHP 8.3+, Laravel 11.x/12.x/13.x) that takes Markdown files and an optional OpenAPI YAML spec from a `docs/` directory and generates a complete static documentation website in `public/docs/`. It ships with two visual themes (`default` and `modern`) switchable via a single config key. It provides server-side syntax highlighting, Mermaid diagram rendering, client-side full-text search (Fuse.js), dark/light theme toggle, a responsive 3-column layout, and an interactive API reference with "Try it out" panels. No Node.js or frontend build step is required ‚Äî pre-compiled CSS and JS ship with the package.

## Quick Start

Install:
```bash
composer require lynkbyte/docs-builder
```

Scaffold starter files:
```bash
php artisan docs:init
```

Build the documentation:
```bash
php artisan docs:build
```

View the output at `public/docs/index.html` or `/docs` in your running app.

## Key Features

- Markdown to HTML with GitHub Flavored Markdown (tables, task lists, strikethrough)
- Server-side syntax highlighting for 15+ languages via Tempest Highlight
- Mermaid diagram rendering (flowcharts, sequence diagrams, ERDs, etc.) with zoom, pan, and fullscreen
- Image enhancement (figure/caption wrapping, click-to-zoom lightbox, lazy loading)
- Video embeds (YouTube/Vimeo auto-embed as privacy-enhanced iframes, native `<video>` for .mp4/.webm/.ogg)
- OpenAPI 3.x API reference generation with individual endpoint pages
- Client-side full-text search via Fuse.js, triggered with Cmd+K / Ctrl+K
- Dark/light theme toggle with OS preference detection
- Multiple visual themes: `default` (cool blue) and `modern` (warm amber/gold, inspired by Mintlify/Laravel docs)
- Responsive 3-column layout (sidebar, content, table of contents)
- Pre-compiled assets (zero Node.js required) or optional Vite integration
- Configurable branding: logo, header nav, Google Fonts, CSS theme overrides, footer
- Publishable Blade views for full template control

## Artisan Commands

- `docs:init` ‚Äî Scaffolds config, `docs/README.md`, and `docs/openapi.yaml`. Options: `--force`
- `docs:ai` ‚Äî Publishes AI coding assistant configurations (llms.txt, Cursor rules, Copilot instructions, Claude instructions). Appends to existing files with sentinel markers. Options: `--force`
- `docs:build` ‚Äî Builds the static site from Markdown and OpenAPI sources. Options: `--skip-assets`

## Core Architecture

- `DocsBuilder` ‚Äî Main orchestrator. Cleans output, builds navigation, renders pages via Blade, generates API reference pages, writes search index.
- `MarkdownParser` ‚Äî Converts Markdown to HTML using CommonMark + GFM + HeadingPermalink. Applies server-side syntax highlighting via Tempest Highlight. Processes Mermaid code blocks. Post-processes images (figure/caption, lazy loading, lightbox) and video URLs (YouTube/Vimeo auto-embeds, local video). Extracts headings, description, and plain text for search.
- `OpenApiParser` ‚Äî Parses OpenAPI 3.x YAML files using Symfony/Yaml. Extracts info, endpoints (grouped by tag), parameters, responses, security, and tag icons. Resolves `$ref` references.
- `SearchIndexBuilder` ‚Äî Accumulates page and endpoint entries. Generates `search-index.json` for client-side Fuse.js search.
- `DocsBuilderServiceProvider` ‚Äî Auto-discovered Laravel service provider. Registers config, views, commands, and seven publishable asset groups. Prepends theme view paths when a non-default theme is configured.

## Configuration

The config file is at `config/docs-builder.php`. Key settings:

- `site_name` ‚Äî Documentation site title (default: `'Documentation'`)
- `site_description` ‚Äî Meta description
- `source_dir` ‚Äî Markdown source directory (default: `base_path('docs')`)
- `output_dir` ‚Äî Built HTML output (default: `public_path('docs')`)
- `openapi_file` ‚Äî Path to OpenAPI YAML spec
- `base_url` ‚Äî URL prefix for generated links (default: `'/docs'`)
- `logo` ‚Äî null (default SVG), inline SVG/HTML string, or image URL
- `header_nav` ‚Äî Custom header links or null for defaults
- `fonts` ‚Äî Google Fonts URLs array, or false to disable
- `asset_mode` ‚Äî `'precompiled'` (default) or `'vite'`
- `theme_name` ‚Äî Visual theme: `'default'` or `'modern'`
- `theme` ‚Äî CSS custom property overrides (18 available variables for colors)
- `navigation` ‚Äî Sidebar structure: array of sections, each with pages (title, file, icon, layout)
- `api_tag_icons` ‚Äî Maps OpenAPI tags to Material Symbols icon names
- `api_navigation` ‚Äî API sidebar structure (auto-generated from openapi.yaml if empty)
- `footer` ‚Äî Copyright text and links array
- `support_url` ‚Äî URL for "Contact Support" link in TOC sidebar (null to hide)

## Publishing

Seven publishable groups for granular customization:

- `docs-builder-config` ‚Äî Config file to `config/docs-builder.php`
- `docs-builder-views` ‚Äî Blade templates to `resources/views/vendor/docs-builder/`
- `docs-builder-assets` ‚Äî Pre-compiled CSS/JS to `public/docs/assets/`
- `docs-builder-css` ‚Äî CSS source to `resources/css/docs.css`
- `docs-builder-js` ‚Äî JS source to `resources/js/docs.js`
- `docs-builder-stubs` ‚Äî Init scaffold templates to `stubs/docs-builder/`
- `docs-builder-llms` ‚Äî LLM documentation files (`llms.txt`, `llms-full.txt`) to project root

## Detailed Documentation

- [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt): Comprehensive reference with full configuration options, all class methods, Blade template structure, build pipeline details, code examples, and customization guide.
<!-- docs-builder:end -->
